By clicking on DayBar in the menu bar, you can view your calendar, events, and reminders, which can also be synchronized with Apple Calendar. The app is designed to consolidate calendar and reminder functions in the status bar menu for easy management and viewing. 📦 📦 2026-03-21

tjmlabs/ColiVara
⭐ 1,479 🕒 2026-03-27
⭐ 1,479
🔀 124
 Colivara is a suite of services that allows you to store, search, and retrieve documents based on their visual embedding. ColiVara has state of the art retrieval performance on both text and visual documents. using vision models instead of chunking and text-processing for documents. No OCR, no text extraction, no broken tables, or missing images. 📦 📦 2026-03-27

enescingoz/colab-llm
⭐ 122 🕒 2026-03-25
⭐ 122
🔀 32
 This repository provides a ready-to-use Google Colab notebook that turns Colab into a temporary server for running local LLM models using Ollama.
